svg.title: GC-ATLAS thumbnail and favicon sizes
svg.desc: Square app-icon thumbnail on the left with globe and GC-ATLAS wordmark; three favicon size previews (64, 32, 16 pixels) on the right showing how the glyph simplifies at smaller sizes.

text.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
